name: Kami RPG
description:
𖤝 When the gods of fairy tales turn out to be reality 𖤝

Information on the world (Link)


Author's Note

Another Original world! This one has actually been in my head for a couple of years now, I had just completely forgotten about it. I tried to keep it tied to the mythology as much as I could but I couldn't add much of how it really is without intruding on the scenario itself so sorry about that. But if there is anything you want me to change just let me know and I'll try my best.

When I tell you this took hours I'm not kidding. And most of it was that google site (linked at the top). I got so carried away lmao

Here you can play as whatever you want. Do you want to be a sacrifice to one of the gods? Maybe a vessel? Maybe you want to be a normal human who gets mixed up in it all somehow? I plan on getting a bit more in depth with this one since there are so many paths it can go and really hope at least one of you guys like this RPG. 😝🥰
